hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(md|txt)$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(docs/|\.claude/|locales/|CHANGELOG|README|LICENSE)'; then echo "WARNING: Creating markdown file outside docs/.claude/locales/: $FILE. Consider placing in .claude/skills/ or docs/ instead." >&2; fi; exit 0
